title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio wrapper; chat, generate, create, pull, push, list, delete, copy, show models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models as LLMs, chat models, or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama WebUI); chat界面, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list, delete, copy, show, create models with POJOs and builders.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library for Ollama; strongly-typed structs, streaming, chat, generate, embeddings, model ops.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models; REPL with history, syntax highlighting, markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement; inline suggestions, chat panel, explain code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker Compose, GPU setup, function-calling examples, etc.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple client to chat, generate, pull, list, delete, copy, show models with native Ruby types.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples; run Ollama with GPU (nvidia) or CPU-only in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and common models; reproducible builds and declarative model caching.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats using local Ollama models; slash commands, thread support, configurable system prompts.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama; DM or mention the bot to chat locally, supports streaming replies.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance; generate text, summarize notes, rewrite using Ollama models inside Obsidian.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat and generate code with Ollama; floating window, selection prompts, model switching.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs/docs and ask questions locally.
